description_long: This is an ornate ceramic vase with a bulbous lower body, a narrow neck, and a flared rim, featuring a striking blue and black floral scrollwork pattern on a white background. The surface is glossy and highly reflective, suggesting a glazed finish typical of fine porcelain or ceramic. The decorative motifs are symmetrical and intricate, with stylized flowers and curling vines wrapping around the entire body. The base is slightly wider, providing stability, and the overall silhouette is elegant and traditional. The vase appears to be hollow, suitable for holding flowers or serving as a decorative centerpiece. There are no visible handles or additional structural features beyond the elaborate surface ornamentation.
description: A glossy white ceramic vase with blue and black floral scrollwork, featuring a bulbous base and narrow neck. The surface is highly reflective and richly decorated.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical blue and black floral scrollwork centered on the bulbous body and neck, with the widest part of the vase visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the continuous wrap of the floral pattern and the curvature of the vase's body, with less symmetry than the front.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, displaying the same central floral motif and the full width of the vase's base and neck.
description_view_3: This side view again shows the flowing pattern and curvature, with the design wrapping seamlessly around the vase.
